label: Brineshade Terminator City
description: Brineshade Terminator City constitutes a fortified urban belt aligned with the planet’s high-contrast terminator zone, where mineral haze bands flare under Saltharrow’s hard white radiance. The built fabric rises from fused basalt platforms and salt-cemented foundations engineered against measurable tidal stresses driven by the system’s pronounced gravitic gradients. A dense network of light baffles, reflectors, and shuttered arcades regulates glare and preserves optical clarity along surveyed approach lines. Outer margins grade into wind-scoured saline flats marked by permanent beacons and charted corridors that anchor predictable overland transit.
